heading: Inclusion of project or facility in Corps of Engineers workplan
label: 549b Inclusion of project or facility in Corps of Engineers workplan
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 102 of Pub. L. 115–270section 2201 of this title

children.text: that the Secretary has studied for disposition under an existing authority, including by carrying out a disposition study under ; andsection 549a of this title
for which a final report by the Director of Civil Works has been completed.

children.heading: Notification to committees
children.label: b Notification to committees
children.text: Upon completion of a final report referred to in subsection (a), the Secretary shall transmit a copy of the report to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Environment and Public Works of the Senate.
